_instructions.usage: Edit 'message' for current display. Use 'templates' below as backup messages.
_instructions.enabled: true = show ticker, false = hide ticker
_instructions.emergency: Set active true/false. Use startTime and endTime in UTC format.
notes: If both startTime and endTime are set → runs between those times
If only endTime is set → runs immediately until that time
If only startTime is set → starts at that time and stays active
If both are empty → emergency runs as long as active = true
